sharc
Documentation développeur
CMakeListCode.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Linq;
3 using System.Collections.Generic;
4 
5 namespace XmlToCMake
6 {
7  public partial class CMakeList
8  {
9  public Makefile Makefile { get; private set; }
10 
11  private String OutputPath { get; set; }
12 
13  public String InputPath { get; private set; }
14 
15  public String CompilationFlags { get; private set; }
16 
17  public String LibraryName { get; private set; }
18 
19  public CMakeList ()
20  {
21  }
22 
23  public CMakeList (Makefile makefile,
24  String library_name,
25  String output,
26  String input,
27  String flags)
28  {
29  Makefile = makefile;
30  OutputPath = output.Replace ("\\", "/");
31  InputPath = input.Replace ("\\", "/");
32  CompilationFlags = flags;
33  LibraryName = library_name;
34  }
35 
36  public String Mono {
37  get {
38  if(ArcaneInfra.Common.CommonTools.isWindows()) {
39  return "";
40  } else {
41  return "mono";
42  }
43  }
44  }
45 
46  public IEnumerable<String> DirectoryPaths {
47  get {
48  if(Makefile.directories == null) {
49  return new List<String> ();
50  }
51  return Makefile.directories.Select(f => OutputPath + "/" + f.Value);
52  }
53  }
54 
55  public IEnumerable<String> ModuleFiles {
56  get {
57  return Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).Module ());
58  }
59  }
60 
61  public IEnumerable<String> ModuleHeaders {
62  get {
63  return Makefile.files.Headers (default(Language).Module ());
64  }
65  }
66 
67  public IEnumerable<String> ServiceFiles {
68  get {
69  return Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).Service ());
70  }
71  }
72 
73  public IEnumerable<String> ServiceHeaders {
74  get {
75  var headers = Makefile.files.Headers (default(Language).Service ());
76  foreach(var h in headers) {
77  Console.WriteLine("service header = {0}", h);
78  }
79  return Makefile.files.Headers (default(Language).Service ());
80  }
81  }
82 
83  public IEnumerable<String> CppFiles {
84  get {
85  return Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).Cpp ());
86  }
87  }
88 
89  public IEnumerable<String> CppHeaders {
90  get {
91  var headers = new List<String> ();
92  headers.AddRange(Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).CppHeader ()));
93  headers.AddRange(Makefile.files.Headers (default(Language).Cpp ()));
94  return headers;
95  }
96  }
97 
98  public IEnumerable<String> CFiles {
99  get {
100  return Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).C ());
101  }
102  }
103 
104  public IEnumerable<String> CHeaders {
105  get {
106  if(Makefile.files == null) {
107  return new List<String> ();
108  }
109  var headers = new List<String> ();
110  headers.AddRange(Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).CHeader ()));
111  headers.AddRange(Makefile.files.Headers (default(Language).C ()));
112  return headers;
113  }
114  }
115 
116  public IEnumerable<String> CSharpFiles {
117  get {
118  return Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).CSharp ());
119  }
120  }
121 
122  public IEnumerable<String> AxlFiles {
123  get {
124  var axls = new List<string> ();
125  axls.AddRange (Makefile.files.Files (default(Language).Axl ()));
126  axls.AddRange (ModuleFiles);
127  axls.AddRange (ServiceFiles);
128  return axls;
129  }
130  }
131  }
132 }
133
